steps.title: Find the parallel verb
steps.content: The relative clause is which typically are woven from sumac... and ______ bold colors. The blank is parallel to are woven, joined by and. The subject of the relative clause is baskets — plural and present tense (are).

steps.title: Match tense and number
steps.content:
A (had featured), B (were featuring), and C (featured) all shift to past, breaking parallelism with present-tense are woven.

D (feature) is plural present — parallel to are woven: baskets...are woven from sumac and feature bold colors. D is correct.
